Layout.name: BlockTemplate List

StyledText.Data: Building block templates in FAT - {{FoundCount}} templates found of type <<gFilterType>> with status <<gFilterStatus>>
Example what the template block could look like

Calculation.Text: PatternCount(Self; "Sketched Coded Styled") Or PatternCount ( Self ; "Requires maintenance" )
Not PatternCount ( Baseproject Codebase @ BlockTemplate::Short name ; "version" )
Not PatternCount ( Baseproject Codebase @ BlockTemplate::Short name ; "version" )
IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate::Score generation enabled Codebase version)
